news.paragraph: Gold prices are facing downward pressure as Treasury yields surge, reaching levels not seen since Trump's second term, and the US dollar strengthens due to inflation concerns. While some traders are weighing prospects related to an Iran deal and inflation, the immediate news flow highlights a negative correlation with rising yields and a shift in investor preference towards Bitcoin as an inflation hedge.

headlines.title: Treasury Yields Spike To Trump's Second-Term High, Sinking Gold And S&P 500
